description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a metallic receiver and barrel assembly, complemented by a wooden fixed stock and pistol grip. The handguard and barrel are finished in a matte gray, while the stock and grip display a natural wood grain texture. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and standard iron sights, including a front post and rear aperture. The muzzle is fitted with a flash hider, and the overall construction suggests a robust, utilitarian build. The combination of metal and wood materials gives it a traditional yet functional appearance, suitable for both display and practical use. The proportions and details indicate it is modeled after a military-style service rifle.
description: A traditional rifle with a metallic body, wooden fixed stock and grip, detachable box magazine, and standard iron sights. The design combines robust metal components with natural wood elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, pistol grip, metallic receiver, handguard, and barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the circular muzzle with flash hider, the cylindrical handguard, and the narrow profile of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metallic receiver, detachable magazine, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel, with the iron sights visible along the top.
